title: Builders Shop
description: A Small Mod that expands on Block Choices for Vanilla Blocks
body:
# Welcome to the Builders Shop 

This mod tries to add as many block Variations to the game without messing with original game feel

Looking for Dirt Slabs or something similar of it?

There should be something for you. If not drop by to the discord and say something you need is missing

# FAQ
## Why was this made?

I was bored mostly and alot of mods didnt bring wat they offered so here Iam with this mod.

## Do you add anything new?

Yes there are some new things. Such as the Stone Brick for some block recipes ~~(that I totally didnt add in there so I dont collide with vanilla recipes being in the way)~~. Oh and Vertical Slabs I guess. 

## Will this be backported to X Version?
Eventually. But for the moment this will only stay on 1.20.1-1.20.4

## Will this get a Forge / Neoforge version?
No. I dislike Forge and Neoforge

## Will you port it to Quilt?
No I wont leave Fabric. 

## Can I use it in my Modpack?
Yes you have my permission to use it in any Modpack you want. Tho please credit me when you are making a public pack.

## Can I make a Unofficial Port for Forge/Quilt/Neoforge?
Please dont. I will give notice when people can.


### Check out my other Mods

https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-unedibles

https://modrinth.com/mod/yuns-cuisine
